V2.0:
Added a teambuilding page for easier draft planning (This is still very WIP, so let me know what features you'd like this page to include!)
Added customizability options, including BW sprites, shiny sprites, and alternate Pokemon formes
Added the moves Leech Seed and Hypnosis to all formats
Added a matchup graphic to the Matchup tab (hidden by default, can be unhidden between the team & type chart) (This is just the same one as on the Home tab)
The Matchup tab can now be duplicated without any issues (this does not copy the Home / Moves tabs, though I may find a workaround for that in the future)
Highlighted Tera / Z Captains on the Speed Tiers section
Added Level 120 (for Insurgence) to the Speed Tiers section
Fixed Cresceidon & Shox's stats
Various other fixes from the feedback form
Cleaned up and condensed a LOT of the backend formulas
V1.10.2: Fixed most sprites not loading properly on mobile
V1.10.1:
Fixed leftover colors on the Moves tab when changing teams (hopefully)
Added Shox, the newest CAP Pokemon
Fixed Lightning Rod & Storm Drain showing type immunities in ADV/DPP
Fixed nicknames not being inputtable in most of the teams
Fixed abilities that halve damage (Heatproof, Thick Fat, etc) multiplying
Fixed Mega Crucibelle's sprite not showing
V1.10:
Major Changes / Additions
Completely reworked the Moves tab - This new layout is hopefully easier to look at and allows for new categories to be added much more easily!
Added Screens Support move category (Dual screens & screen removal moves)
Added Screens Support, VGC Moves, & Speed Control moves to all formats
Added Sleep Powder to status moves on all formats
Added all new GPL megas, adjusted reworked ones' stats, and fixed their sprites
Changed the naming conventions of Deoxys, Ogerpon, Urshifu, Kyurem, and more to be consistent with other Pokemon (Deoxys-A, -D, -S rather than the full word)

Minor Changes / Bug Fixes
Adjusted Z-Captain color on the Home tab to hopefully be less of an eyesore
Fixed custom megas from GPL/RR/Insurgence not showing stats properly
Hopefully fixed the update checker on this tab
Updated stats for Chuggalong & Kitsunoh (CAP)
Added Meowstic-F & added movesets for various other formes (Zen Mode Darmanitan, Minior-Core, etc)
Added missing healing moves to the Insurgence format
Fixed Ursaluna-BM stats not appearing in Radical Red
Fixed Toxic Spikes and Aromatherapy missing from Roserade's USUM moveset
Fixed a lot of random typos that were preventing some Pokemons' moves from showing properly
Removed average stats - it's pretty much irrelevant
V1.9.2:
Added 5 more team slots - the doc can now handle 20 teams at once
Changed the highlight color of Z-Captains to differentiate between them and Tera Captains
Fixed a bug with the weak algorithm on the detailed type matchups
V1.9.1:
Fixed the Moves tab not working properly for gens 3-5
Fixed Delta Medicham's Speed being incorrect
Fixed Archaludon not getting Stealth Rock in National Dex
Fixed Z Captains not getting highlighted properly on the Home page
V1.9:
Changed lots of Pokemon name formats to be consistent with other common docs (Venusaur-Mega -> Mega Venusaur, Ninetales-Alola -> Alolan Ninetales, etc)
Added Tera Type support (begrudgingly)
Tweaked the weakness formula in Detailed Type Matchups - It now gives -2 score if he type has 0 resists and -1 if it only has one resist.
Added nickname support on the Teams tab
Added Chuggalong, the newest CAP Pokemon
Cleaned up a lot of backend code (again)
Added an update checker to the top of this tab
Added a feedback form - if you have any suggestions, bug reports, complaints, etc, feel free to submit one!
Added a warning in most tabs when overwriting code that should not be edited
Fixed G-Max Pokemon not showing in SwSh (for the two people that play SwSh VGC)
V1.8:
Fixed the "Disruption" typo on the Moves tab. Words can't describe how sorry I am for that, and I hope I can earn your forgiveness.
Completely revamped the Type Matchup section on the "Matchup" tab
- Changed the color scheme so that it's not a huge eyesore
- Added two rows - "STAB" shows how many Pokemon you have of the specific types, and "Weak" shows how weak your team is overall to that type. Negative means more weak than resistant, Positive means more resistant than weak, and 0 means neutral.
    - "2x" is weighted -1, "4x/8x" are weighted -2, "0.5x" is weighted 1, "0.25x/0.125x/0x" are weighted 2." They are all added up to get the final number.
Added support for my league P2 Lab's custom format (buffed and revamped mons)
- Shameless plug - Applications for Season 2 are open until March 15, so be sure to apply if you're interested! The Discord link is under the donation link on this tab.
Finally implemented the DLC mons' home sprites. No more ugly Ogerpon just standing there.
Changed stat colors on the Matchup tab to be a gradient (Red is the lowest, Yellow is middle, Light Blue is highest)
Added Average stats on the Matchup tab
Changed U-turn to U-turn (Um ackshually the "turn" is supposed to be lowercase :nerd:)
Added toggles to view/hide Choice Scarf speed tiers
Reorganized some parts / changed some colors to hopefully make the doc a bit easier to use & understand
Fixed Swalot not getting Toxic Spikes in National Dex
V1.7:
Added more healing moves to the Moves tab (Recover, Roost, etc) (Implemented on all formats except Insurgence)
Added two new move categories, Speed Control (Trick Room, Tailwind, etc) and VGC Support (Follow Me, Helping Hand, etc) Currently only Gen 9 formats are supported; I'll add more in the future as needed.
- Note: I used /ds on Showdown to add the new moves, which don't include alt forms (such as megas & legendary forms) so I had to manually add those. If I missed anything, please let me know.
Added a Singles/VGC mode toggle on the moves tab - Singles shows Hazard Setting/Removal, and VGC shows VGC Support/Speed Control
Added Choice Scarf speed tiers on the matchup tab
Tweaked speed tier colors on the Home tab to make them more noticeable
Fixed some LC speed tiers being inaccurate
Removed baby Terapagos and renamed Terapagos-Tera to just Terapagos. No reason to show baby Terapagos since it basically doesn't exist in battle.
Fixed some misnamed Pokemon on the National Dex movelist
V1.6:
Added all new mons in the Indigo Disk DLC
Updated old mon's movesets
Added Upper Hand and Thunderclap as priority moves
Added sorting functionality on the Matchup tab. You can now sort your team by alphabetical order and different stats!
Tweaked coloring *again* to make the whole doc less of an eyesore (hopefully)
Added an alternate type chart option to the Matchup tab (either can be hidden at the top)
Flipped Red/Blue colors to be more consistent with other prep docs
Reworked this tab & added a shameless donate link :)
V1.5:
Added new mons in the Teal Mask DLC
Changed Shiftry & the Piplup line's abilities to their new ones
Updated old mon's movesets with new TMs (Spikes/TSpikes Gliscor, Knock Off Tyranitar, etc)
-Please let me know if you find any errors. I added most of the new moves manually. Also shoutout to EndlessGadgets for providing a changelog for National Dex!
Fixed Hisuian Avalugg's speed in Radical Red
Fixed a few mons showing moves twice in National Dex
Fixed Alolan Grimer/Muk not getting Shadow Sneak in Paldea Dex
V1.4:
Added BW, DPP, ADV, Insurgence, & Radical Red format support
-Note: Some custom formats share custom megas, so custom megas are identified by tags (GPL, Ins, & RR). These will only show on the Teams tab (The Data tab renamed)
Reworked the home tab - Condensed it into one matchup with a dropdown to switch between matchups, and added speed tiers
Moved format dropdowns to the Teams tab so that the format automatically changes upon switching matchups
Gave the entire doc a fresh coat of paint to make it (hopefully) more aesthetically pleasing
Cleaned up A LOT of backend data. Hopefully the doc runs a bit smoother now.
Added GPL to the National Dex format. It is no longer its own separate format.
Added Base Stats to the matchup tab
Fixed some missing moves on various Pokemon
Fixed incorrect stats for Oinkologne-F, Ting-Lu, and Brute Bonnet
Fixed Chromera's typing
Updated Mega Cramorant's ability name
Removed Buffmons, for now
V1.3:
Added SwSh, USUM, ORAS, CAP, and Buffmons format support (Note: CAP falls under Paldea & NatDex)
-Shows different abilities/stats/movesets from older generations
-Formats are now switched on the Matchup tab rather than the Moves tab
Added all of the new GPL Megas
Fixed half of the G-Max Pokemon not showing movesets properly on NatDex (as if anyone will use this)
Lots of backend code cleaned up
Fixed Hisuian Zoroark's sprite showing base Zoroark instead
Fixed Mega Avalugg & Aromatisse's sprites being mixed up
V1.2:
Recolored most of the doc to look better!
Added Status, Priority, and Disruption moves to the Moves tab
Added Stone Axe and Ceaseless Edge as Hazard Setting moves
Added the option to add a Pokepaste link on the Home tab
Added an editable Matchup Notes section on the Matchup tab
Added this tab!
V1.1:
Added the ability to set Terastal, Z-Move, and Dynamax Captains
Added a budgeting function to the Data tab for keeping track of points during drafts
Added an organized Speed Tiers section to the matchups tab
Added Item Removal moves to the Moves tab (Knock Off, Trick, etc)
Changed a few form names for simplicity and separated the Oricorio forms
A few minor bug fixes
